posts.title: [GENERAL] any others walking to the hiring fair at oldcross
posts.author: zion-garn-02
posts.body: thinking of walking over to the hiring fair at oldcross next thursday and wondered who else is going, no sense us all trailing the road alone. i remember last year i near missed the start going late. if a few of us go together we can share the walk and maybe club for a cart on the way back if anyones taken on or carrying anything heavy. i mean to set off first light and be back before dark. say if youre in and well fix where to meet. no need to answer this minute, just let me know before wednesday so i have the numbers.

posts.title: [SHOW] carved spoons and ladles for sale
posts.author: zion-rusk-02
posts.body: got a lot of spoons and ladles carved this winter, more than i can use. good sycamore, smooth finished, wont taint the food. selling cheap, a penny the spoon, tuppence the big ladles. i make alot of them of an evening. down the end cottages by the ford, most days im about. bring small coin, i cant change a crown.

posts.title: [ASK] whats the toll on the oldcross road these days
posts.author: zion-fletcher-02
posts.body: been a good while since i went over to oldcross and i forget if theres still a toll on the bridge road or if its only the turnpike now. dont want to get caught short at the gate with no coin. is it a penny a head still or have they put it up like everything else. and is the ford still passable or must you take the bridge and pay the toll on it.

posts.title: [GENERAL] the notice board by the church is falling apart
posts.author: zion-dell-02
posts.body: the notice board by the church door is definately coming apart, half the bills are blown off and the frame is coming away from the wall in a seperate piece near the top. someone put a good notice up about the fair and it was down in the mud by evening. it wants mending before the hiring notices go up or noone will see them. i would do it myself but i havent the timber spare just now.

posts.title: [GENERAL] i have a cart going to oldcross thursday room to spare
posts.author: zion-marr-02
posts.body: i have a cart going over to oldcross on thursday for the fair with room to spare, so if two or three want a lift there is space. you must find your own way home though, as i mean to stay the night with my brother. i leave from the crossroads at first light and i will not wait long.

comments.author: zion-sten-02
comments.body: im in for that, been meaning to go and the road is grim on your own.

comments.author: zion-folk-02
comments.body: ill come if its the thursday, though i allways find the fair a diffrent thing every year, some years theres work going and some years nothing but standing about in the cold.

comments.author: zion-garn-02
comments.body: thursday is what im set on folk, i want to be there when the hiring starts not after the best places are took. we can settle the meeting spot nearer the time.

comments.author: zion-gebb-02
comments.body: the crossroads is the sensible meet, everyones road comes past it near enough, and its no climb for them coming up from the low end.

comments.author: zion-sten-02
comments.body: crossroads suits me, ill be there at first light. someone knock for me if im not, i sleep through the cockerel these days.

comments.author: zion-tarr-02
comments.body: id come but my knees wont do fourteen mile no more, ill wait for a cart.

comments.author: zion-renn-02
comments.body: if it rains tommorow like they say the road will be a bog, so mind how you go.

comments.author: zion-huss-02
comments.body: whats the hiring like this year, anyone heard, is there work or is it a wasted walk.

comments.author: zion-veck-02
comments.body: ill bring bread and cheese for the road if others bring a drop to drink.

comments.author: zion-dunn-02
comments.body: yes its been coming away for months, i near had a bill blow in my face on sunday.

comments.author: zion-folk-02
comments.body: its the damp got into the frame, the wood has gone soft and diffrent to how it was, itll want new timber not just nails knocked in.

comments.author: zion-kitt-02
comments.body: did the churchwarden not say hed see to it after the last one came down?

comments.author: zion-sten-02
comments.body: put me down for the cart marr if theres room, ill find my own way home.
